# 1.8 Shared Serializers & Constants

## Classes to Migrate

| Existing Class | Source | Migration Notes |
|---------------|--------|-----------------|
| `Serializers` (ZonedDateTime encoder/decoder) | `gov-apis/common` | Move to `repcheck.shared.models.codecs` |
| `Constants.OutgoingDateTimeFormat` | `gov-apis/common` | Move to `repcheck.shared.models.constants` |

## New Enums

| Enum | Values | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| `BillType` | HR, S, HJRES, SJRES, HCONRES, SCONRES, HRES, SRES, plus 5 additional | Migrate from existing `BillTypes` |
| `Chamber` | House, Senate | New |
| `Party` | Democrat, Republican, Independent | Maps to member/vote party data; abbreviations: D, R, I |
| `VoteCast` | Yea, Nay, Present, NotVoting, Absent | Maps to vote_positions.position; Absent ≠ NotVoting |
| `VoteType` | Passage, ConferenceReport, Cloture, VetoOverride, Amendment, Committee, Recommit, Other | Maps to votes.vote_type |
| `AmendmentType` | HAMDT, SAMDT, SUAMDT | Maps to amendments.amendment_type |
| `FindingType` | TopicExtraction, BillSummary, PolicyAnalysis, StanceDetection, Pork, Rider, Lobbying, Constitutional, TextVersionDiff, Impact, FiscalEstimate | 11 total: seed data + LLM analysis types |
| `FormatType` | FormattedText, PDF, FormattedXml | Migrate from existing enum |
| `TextVersionCode` | IH, IS, RH, RS, RFS, RFH, EH, ES, ENR, CPH, CPS | Bill text version legislative stage codes |
| `ChangeType` | Added, Removed, Modified, Renumbered | Section-level change types in diffs |
| `CommitteePosition` | Chairman, RankingMember, ViceChairman, Member | Member's role on committee with attribution weight |
| `CommitteeSide` | Majority, Minority | Member's party side on committee |
| `CommitteeType` | Standing, Special, Select, Joint, Subcommittee | Type of congressional committee |

## Committee Attribution Weights

`CommitteePosition.weight: Double` multiplies with committee vote weight (0.4) for alignment scoring.

| Position | Weight | Rationale |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| Chairman | 1.0 | Controls markup, maximum responsibility |
| Ranking Member | 0.7 | Leads opposition strategy |
| Vice Chairman | 0.6 | Deputy leadership |
| Member | 0.4 | Participated in process |

Example: Chairman's changes = 1.0 × 0.4 = 0.40 alignment impact; Member's changes = 0.4 × 0.4 = 0.16.

| Codec | Type | Notes |

## New Constants

| Object | Contents |
|--------|----------|
| `CongressGovApiPaths` | Base URL + path templates: `/v3/bill`, `/v3/member`, `/v3/house-vote`, `/v3/amendment`, `/v3/committee` |
| `ChamberDataPaths` | Senate: `senate.gov/legislative/LIS_MEMBER/cvc_member_data.xml` (members + committees), `senate.gov/legislative/LIS/roll_call_votes/` (votes). House: `clerk.house.gov/xml/lists/memberdata.xml` (members + committees) |
| `PaginationDefaults` | defaultPageSize: Int, maxPageSize: Int |

## Multi-Source Alias Mapping

Each enum must parse all known source representations via `fromString` (case-insensitive, alias-aware), returning `Left(unrecognized, validValues)` on failure.

| Enum | Aliases → Canonical |
|------|---------------------|
| `Party` | "Democratic", "Democrat", "D" → Democrat; "Republican", "R" → Republican; "Independent", "I", "ID" → Independent |
| `Chamber` | "House", "House of Representatives" → House; "Senate" → Senate |
| `VoteCast` | "Yea", "Aye", "Yes" → Yea; "Nay", "No" → Nay; "Present" → Present; "Not Voting", "NotVoting" → NotVoting; "Absent" → Absent |
| `CommitteePosition` | "Chairman", "Chair", "Chairwoman", "Chairperson" → Chairman; "Ranking", "Ranking Member" → RankingMember; "Vice Chairman", "Vice Chair", "Vice Chairwoman" → ViceChairman; "Member" → Member |
| `CommitteeSide` | "majority", "Majority", "M" → Majority; "minority", "Minority" → Minority |
| `TextVersionCode` | Code + full name for all 11 values (e.g., "RH", "Reported in House" → RH) |

## Acceptance Criteria

**Functional:**
1. `ZonedDateTime` encoder/decoder round-trips ISO-8601 format, matching existing behavior.
2. `LocalDate` encoder/decoder round-trips ISO-8601 date format (`yyyy-MM-dd`).
3. `UUID` encoder/decoder round-trips standard UUID string format.
4. Every enum has: Circe encoder (canonical string), Circe decoder (case-insensitive + alias-aware), `fromString` returning `Either`.
5. `fromString` accepts all known source representations and maps to canonical value; returns `Left(unrecognized, validValues+aliases)` on failure.
6. `BillType` includes all 13 values from existing `BillTypes`.
7. `VoteType.fromQuestion` classifies known patterns ("On Passage" → Passage, "On Cloture" → Cloture), returns Other for unrecognized.
8. `FindingType` matches seed data + TextVersionDiff, Impact, FiscalEstimate (11 total).
9. `TextVersionCode` covers 11 codes; `fromString` accepts code and full name.
10. `CommitteePosition`, `CommitteeSide`, `CommitteeType` have Circe codecs and `fromString`.
11. `CommitteePosition.weight`: Chairman = 1.0, RankingMember = 0.7, ViceChairman = 0.6, Member = 0.4.
12. `CongressGovApiPaths` produces correct URLs when interpolated.
13. `ChamberDataPaths` contains correct Senate/House URLs.

**Tests:**
14. Round-trip codec tests: ZonedDateTime (timezones, UTC, edge cases), LocalDate (various formats), UUID.
15. Exhaustive enum parsing: every value parses from canonical string.
16. Unknown enum value tests: descriptive `Left` with valid values + aliases.
17. Case-insensitivity: "HOUSE", "house", "House" → Chamber.House.
18. Multi-source alias tests: every alias in mapping table has dedicated test case.
19. `CommitteePosition.weight` verification: Chairman = 1.0, RankingMember = 0.7, ViceChairman = 0.6, Member = 0.4.
